subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Hadith لا یسعنی (Commentary on the Tradition "Heaven and Earth cannot contain me…")
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath bestowed upon His servants grace and bounty in these days wherein He hath manifested [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بما من علی العباد بالفضل و الافضال فی هذه الایام التی فیها تجلی علی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @literal interpretation, @blind imitation [taqlid]
